title: Recipe 3 for Avibacterium paragallinarum Strains from Yangzhou
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4314c","text":"This recipe was generated by our Deep16SCulture AI framework for Avibacterium paragallinarum Strains from Yangzhou University.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":65,"length":27}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"bshwl","text":"- Bacto Agar: 15,000 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"keuby","text":"- Glucose: 5,000 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dgyo6","text":"- L-Cysteine: 500 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"lqvab","text":"- Tryptone: 30,000 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"vuvlr","text":"- Yeast extract: 20,000 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"wyqam","text":"- Hemin solution: 25 ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"homxt","text":"- NAD: 10 mg (added)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"otgk8","text":"- Water: 1,000 ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d6fu3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"wtqrw","text":"Optional: Glucose.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
